subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Know thou the worth of this noble father who guided thee to the living waters and led thee to the truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق قدر این پدر بزرگوار را بدان که تو را بمعین حیوان دلالت کرد و بسر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
